mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place (name, address, city, district, country, latitude, longitude, source, external_ref) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{city}, #{district}, #{country}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{source}, #{externalRef}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name), address=VALUES(address), city=VALUES(city), district=VALUES(district), country=VALUES(country), latitude=VALUES(latitude), longitude=VALUES(longitude)

INSERT INTO place (name, address, city, district, country, latitude, longitude, source, external_ref) VALUES
(#{p.name}, #{p.address}, #{p.city}, #{p.district}, #{p.country}, #{p.latitude}, #{p.longitude}, #{p.source}, #{p.externalRef})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name), address=VALUES(address), city=VALUES(city), district=VALUES(district), country=VALUES(country), latitude=VALUES(latitude), longitude=VALUES(longitude)
